item.title: Place where Creative souls get captured Brownfish Studio
item.description: Place where Creative souls get captured Brownfish Studio

item.title: I always thought anger meant being loud and aggressive. Whereas most of my life ...
item.description: I always thought anger meant being loud and aggressive. Whereas most of my life i always kept my anger in silence and preserved it like a weapon. And whenever i chose a third feeling or emotion in life, It had always caused me to fall harder. Wanted to know if its just me or are there more people who could relate to it. Hope this helps you find clarity.

item.title: This is the last video from this view I won’t be making videos from this angle a...
item.description: This is the last video from this view I won’t be making videos from this angle anymore Salman Mohammad Muqtadir Disha Islam and you all won’t be seen like this again. I will miss this a lot Congratulations on your Brownfish Studio #everyone #everyoneシ゚ #explore #fblifestyle #fypシ #reel @
